stem: Scientists ___ a tiny flaw in the mirror since the launch.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时表示过去动作对现在的结果。since the launch 提示从过去持续到现在,应用 have found。found 仅表示过去;find/are finding 时态不符。

stem: A repair mission ___ by NASA to solve the problem.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动语态。任务是“被计划”,主语 mission 为受动者,故用 was planned。planned 主动不完整;is planning 主语逻辑不符;has plan 结构错误。

stem: New instruments ___ during the shuttle mission.
explanation: 考点:过去时被动语态。during the mission 表过去场景,且 instruments 是被安装,应为 were installed。其余选项语态或结构错误。

stem: The telescope ___ clear pictures for many years now.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。for many years now 强调持续到现在,应用 has sent。sent/sends/was sending 均不能准确表达持续结果。

stem: The flaw ___ (correct) by engineers already.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动语态。already + 被动意义提示 has been corrected。

stem: After the fire, he ___ the windows repaired.
explanation: 考点:使役结构 have something done。句型为 had the windows repaired,表示“请人修窗户”。其余选项不能构成该结构。

stem: The neighbours ___ early and helped clear the shop.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时叙事。故事讲过去发生的动作,应用 arrived。其余选项时态不符。

stem: She had the walls ___ in warm colors.
explanation: 考点:have something done 中宾语后接过去分词。故应为 had the walls painted。

stem: Three weeks later, the shop ___ and customers returned.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。Three weeks later 位于过去叙事中,应用 reopened。

stem: He ___ (have) the floor repaired after the accident.
explanation: 考点:使役结构 have something done。过去语境下应填 had。

stem: He ___ jokes to the passengers all the way.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。叙述已发生动作,应用过去式 told。其他选项结构或时态错误。

stem: His wife ___ at his stories on the plane.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时否定结构。应为 did not + 动词原形 laugh。其余选项结构或时态不正确。

stem: After landing, she ___ him she felt embarrassed.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。after landing 为过去情境,主句应使用 told。

stem: He ___ her feelings at first.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时否定。at first 位于过去叙事中,应用 did not understand。

stem: She ___ (not smile) during the performance.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时否定形式。not smile 需借助 did,构成 did not smile。

stem: Engineers ___ from both sides of the Channel.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。该句讲历史建设过程,应用 worked。

stem: Train travel became ___ than ferry travel.
explanation: 考点:比较级与 than 搭配。应使用 faster than。fastest 为最高级;more fast 错误。

stem: The two tunnel sections finally ___ under the sea.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。finally 表示已完成结果动作,应用 met。

stem: The new route is ___ reliable than the old ferry line.
explanation: 考点:多音节形容词比较级。reliable 的比较级为 more reliable。

stem: The project ___ (cost) more than people expected.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。该句叙述已发生事实,动词 cost 过去式仍为 cost。

stem: The old jumbo jet ___ into several parts.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。飞机是被拆解,故用 was dismantled。

stem: Each section ___ on a long trailer at night.
explanation: 考点:过去时被动语态。section 为受动者,应用 was transported。

stem: The convoy ___ the airport at midnight.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时主动叙事。车队执行动作,应用 left。was left 语义错误。

stem: Several streets ___ for safety during the move.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。街道是被封闭,故用 were blocked。

stem: The wings ___ (remove) before transport.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动语态。wings 为复数受动者,应填 were removed。

stem: The bees ___ a nest inside the cupboard long before.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。筑巢动作发生在另一个过去动作前,应为 had built。

stem: When the wood was cut, honey ___ out.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。cut 为过去节点动作,主线结果动作用 flowed。

stem: The smell was ___ sweet ___ fresh honey.
explanation: 考点:as...as 同级比较固定结构。应为 as sweet as。

stem: By that time, the honey ___ into crystals.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。到过去某时前已经完成变化,应用 had turned。

stem: The old cupboard was as solid as a new one, and bees ___ (build) inside it years before.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。years before 表示先于后续过去动作,故填 had built。

stem: Many volcanoes ___ in recent years.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。in recent years 常与现在完成时搭配,表示到现在的经历。

stem: Thousands of villagers ___ before the eruption.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。村民是被撤离,应用 were evacuated。

stem: Warning signals ___ by modern sensors.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。signals 为受动者且强调已完成记录,应用 have been recorded。

stem: Scientists ___ a lot from these eruptions.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。强调过去经验对现在知识积累的影响,应用 have learned。

stem: Large areas ___ (cover) with ash after the eruption.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。areas 为受动者,过去场景下填 were covered。

stem: The salesman ___ on our door for weeks.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。for weeks 强调持续过程,应用 has been knocking。

stem: She ___ him politely yesterday again.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。yesterday 为明确过去时间,应用 refused。

stem: He ___ the same offer all morning.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。all morning 表示持续到现在的过程,应用 has been repeating。

stem: At last she ___ the door and listened to him.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。at last 表示过去叙事中的结果动作,用 opened。

stem: We ___ (wait) for his visit since last month.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。since last month 表示从过去持续到现在,应填 have been waiting。

stem: Before the police arrived, he ___ his money away.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。转移钱发生在 arrived 之前,应用 had moved。

stem: She said that she ___ his plan at first.
explanation: 考点:间接引语中时态后移。转述过去之前的状态,应用 had believed。

stem: The officer told us he ___ check the hotel records.
explanation: 考点:间接引语中过去将来意义。told 为过去时,从句将来动作后移为 would check。

stem: By that evening, the false story ___ by everyone.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。到过去某时前“已被相信”,应用 had been accepted。

stem: He said that he ___ (not see) the victim before.
explanation: 考点:间接引语中的过去完成时否定。表示在 said 之前未见过,故填 had not seen。

stem: The bullfighter hid ___ a newspaper before the show.
explanation: 考点:介词表示位置。behind 表示“在......后面”,与句意最符。

stem: The bull suddenly ___ across the ring.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。叙事中的突发动作应用过去式 charged。

stem: The assistant ran ___ the center and helped him.
explanation: 考点:介词 through 表“穿过内部空间”。在场地中穿行应选 through。

stem: He ___ his red cape by accident.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。过去比赛情境中的动作,应用 dropped。

stem: He stood ___ (behind) the barrier for a moment.
explanation: 考点:介词 behind 表示位置“在后面”,与 barrier 搭配自然。

stem: Several gears ___ before the repair team arrived.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。齿轮在 arrived 之前已被损坏,应用 had been damaged。

stem: The clock ___ for safety checks during the storm.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。大钟是被停用,故用 was stopped。

stem: By winter, the mechanism ___ completely.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。by winter 表过去参照点,之前已被修好,应用 had been repaired。

stem: Heavy parts ___ carefully by crane.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。parts 为受动者,过去发生动作应用 were lowered。

stem: Before it restarted, every part ___ (test) by engineers.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。测试先于 restarted,应填 had been tested。

stem: The team ___ the engine all week before the race.
explanation: 考点:过去完成进行时。all week + before 表示过去某时前一直持续,应用 had been testing。

stem: Bluebird was ___ than the previous model.
explanation: 考点:比较级。than 前应使用比较级 faster。

stem: He ___ for months before he broke the record.
explanation: 考点:过去完成进行时。训练在 broke 之前持续进行,应为 had been training。

stem: The new design was ___ stable at high speed.
explanation: 考点:比较级。stable 的比较结构是 more stable,故选 more。

stem: Before the final run, the engineers ___ (check) the car repeatedly.
explanation: 考点:过去完成进行时。repeatedly + before final run 表示过去某时前持续动作,填 had been checking。
